codeReview.summary: The navigation-completeness feature has been fully implemented and verified. The worker performed a comprehensive audit of all application routes and confirmed that every documented route is reachable through visible UI elements without requiring manual URL entry.

summary: Navigation completeness verification passed. All routes are accessible via visible UI elements: /dashboard links to /plan/new (via header nav 'New Plan' and empty state CTA), /plan/[id] (via plan cards), /playbooks (via header nav), and /playbooks/submit (via 'Share Your Story' CTA on playbooks page). The header nav with Dashboard, New Plan, and Playbooks links is present on all authenticated pages via the (protected)/layout.tsx. Every page has navigation back to /dashboard. No dead-end pages exist. The implementation matches the feature description exactly.
